title: <div>  •  The Pardoner’s Trick adds an element of surprise and playfulness.</div
content:
• The Pardoner’s Trick adds an element of surprise and playfulness.

📜 5. Final XP Payout System

📜 XP must be used before the final week, encouraging strategy.
✔ A scoreboard in class will track XP (like a casino leaderboard).
✔ XP can be spent on:
• Grade Boosts (Can increase a past participation grade).
• Extra Research Time (Can extend one final paper deadline).
• Rerolling a Challenge (One retry on an in-class game or Mastery Exam).

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages students to play strategically throughout the semester.
• Adds a final layer of gamification that rewards engagement.
• Ties into classroom decision-making with real stakes.

📜 6. Three-Tiered Weekly POV Structure (Finalized)

📜 Each class session will now have a POV framing device.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 134 (chunk 134/555)
